name: Kingdom Eau de Parfum
short: A regal eau de parfum embodying sophistication and timeless allure.
description: Kingdom is a regal eau de parfum that opens with a majestic burst of saffron and bergamot, blooms into a heart of rose and damask plum, and settles into a rich, regal base of oud, leather, and amber. Composed at high concentration for an authoritative, commanding sillage that lasts 12+ hours. Hand-filled and finished in our Udaipur atelier. A scent for those who carry themselves like royalty — quietly assured, impossible to ignore.
benefits: Regal composition with saffron, oud, and leather
Weighted glass flacon with brass-tone cap
usage: Spritz onto pulse points — wrists, neck, behind the ears — from a distance of 6 inches. Do not rub. Reapply as desired. A commanding scent for evenings and special occasions.

customerReviews.title: Fabulous smell
customerReviews.body: The perfume smell is too good gives you a awesome wibe I am much happy to buy it hard and long lasting smell
